Notes.Text:
This update for ffmpeg fixes the following issue

- CVE-2025-10256: NULL pointer dereference in Firequalizer filter (bsc#1249431).

Vulnerabilities.Description: A NULL pointer dereference vulnerability exists in FFmpeg's Firequalizer filter (libavfilter/af_firequalizer.c) due to a missing check on the return value of av_malloc_array() in the config_input() function. An attacker could exploit this by tricking a victim into processing a crafted media file with the Firequalizer filter enabled, causing the application to dereference a NULL pointer and crash, leading to denial of service.
